description_long: This is a modern office cubicle setup featuring a large, rectangular desk with two sets of drawers on either side, providing ample storage space. The desk surface holds a flat-screen computer monitor, a sheet of paper, and a red coffee mug, suggesting a workspace for administrative or computer-based tasks. A black ergonomic office chair with wheels is positioned in front of the desk, allowing for comfortable seating and mobility. The cubicle is enclosed on three sides by tall, gray partition walls, offering privacy and sound dampening. To the right of the desk, there is a tall, multi-drawer filing cabinet for additional document storage. A round wall clock is mounted on the left partition, helping users keep track of time during work hours.
description: A modern office cubicle with a large desk, dual drawer sets, a computer monitor, and a tall filing cabinet, all enclosed by gray partition walls. Includes an office chair and a wall clock, creating a functional workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the desk with drawers, computer monitor, chair, paper, mug, filing cabinet, and wall clock inside the cubicle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall filing cabinet and the left partition wall with the clock visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the cubicle walls and the side of the filing cabinet, with minimal desk detail visible.
description_view_3: Back view showing the plain exterior of the cubicle walls, with no interior features visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the open section with the chair, drawers, and computer monitor, while the back and sides are enclosed by partition walls. The tall filing cabinet is positioned to the user's right.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation for office tasks and document management
